nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 非法猎捕
nodes.summary: 直接捕杀或非法贸易导致种群下降。

nodes.name: 滩涂
nodes.summary: 迁飞水鸟高度依赖的滨海觅食带。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Timor friarbird
nodes.summary: Timor friarbird（Timor friarbird，学名 Philemon inornatus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括滩涂，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、非法猎捕、森林砍伐。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: PRAMANA |last5=SULAKSONO |first5=NURPANA |date=2021-04-28 |title=Characteristics of vegetation as determinant of Timor Friarbird (Philemon inornatus) distribution in Bipolo Lanscape [sic] of West Timor Island, Indonesia |journal=Biodiversitas Journal of Biological Diversity |volume=22 |issue=5 |doi=10.13057/biodiv/d220521 |issn=2085-4722|doi-access=free }} Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical dry forests; it tends to be most present near roads, particularly flat low-traffic roads near rivers and mangroves. It is a species generalist

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by human-caused habitat loss—caused by logging, forest fires, and illegitimate grazing—and poaching. Over the past decade, its population has decreased significantly

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: It is threatened by human-caused habitat loss—caused by logging, forest fires, and illegitimate grazing—and poaching. Over the past decade, its population has decreased significantly
